task.description: WTI Crude Oil continuous front-month futures Close price (yfinance symbol: CL=F), projected 5, 10, and 21 trading days ahead.

spec.description: Weekly rolling backtest in 2025 for daily WTI crude oil price forecasting. Evaluates trajectory forecasts (5, 10, 21 business days) with CRPS/MAE and binary up-shock forecasts (climb > $5 in 5 business days) with Brier Score. Used to select the top contender models.
